calendar.matters:
Petitiin To Approve Trustee'S Decision To Enter Into Settelement Agreement.
Off Calendar Mar-18-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Seth Skootsky for Carol Price (Petitioner).

Mr. Skootsky reported that the settlement agreement on the seperate estate proceeding established in Los Angeles was still pending. The Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court).

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Kathy Kollehner CSR#4102. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Santiago
